convert_md.c

00023  * information or have any questions.

00025 
00026 #include "wrappers.h"
00027 
00028 #define UTF8 "UTF-8"
00029 
00030 static iconv_t
00031 open_iconv(const char* to, const char* from) {
00032     iconv_t ic = iconv_open(to, from);
00033     if (ic == (iconv_t)-1) {
00034         if (errno == EINVAL) {
00035             /* There is a bug in some versions of Solaris in which
00036              * nl_langinfo() returns a string beginning with ISO, but you
00037              * have to remove the ISO before calling open_iconv.
00038              */
00039             if (strncmp(from, "ISO", 3) == 0) {
00040                 /* Try again, but with the ISO in front of the "from" */
00041                 return open_iconv(to, from + 3);
00042             } else if (strncmp(to, "ISO", 3) == 0) {
00043                 /* Try again, but with the ISO in front of the "to" */
00044                 return open_iconv(to + 3, from);
00045             } else {
00046                 fprintf(stderr, "%s to %s not supported on this platform\n",
00047                         from, to);
00048             }
00049         } else {
00050             perror("iconv_open error: ");
00051         }
00052         exit(1);
00053     }
00054     return ic;
00055 }
00056 
00057 static char*
00058 get_langinfo_codeset()
00059 {
00060     static char *name = NULL;
00061 
00062     if (name == NULL) {
00063         #if HAVE_LANGINFO_H
00064         name = nl_langinfo(CODESET);
00065         #endif
00066         if (name == NULL || strlen(name) == 0) {
00067             name = "ISO8859-1";
00068         }
00069     }
00070     return name;
00071 }
00072 
00073 int native2utf8(const char* from, char* to, int buflen) {
00074     int ret;
00075     size_t ileft, oleft;
00076     char *langinfo_codeset = get_langinfo_codeset();
00077     iconv_t ic;
00078     if (strncmp(langinfo_codeset, UTF8, 5) == 0) {
00079         /* don't invoke 'iconv' functions to do the
00080          * conversion if it's already in UTF-8 encoding
00081          */
00082         memcpy(to, from, buflen);
00083         return 0;
00084     }
00085 
00086     ic = open_iconv(UTF8, get_langinfo_codeset());
00087     memset(to, 0, buflen);
00088     ileft = strlen(from);
00089     oleft = buflen;
00090 
00091     ret = iconv(ic, &from, &ileft, &to, &oleft);
00092     if (ret == (size_t)-1) {
00093         fprintf(stderr, "native2utf8:Failed to convert (err=%d)\n", ret);
00094         exit(1);
00095     }
00096     iconv_close(ic);
00097 
00098     return buflen-oleft;
00099 }
00100 
00101 int utf2native(const char* from, char* to, int buflen) {
00102     int ret;
00103     size_t ileft, oleft;
00104 
00105     char *langinfo_codeset = get_langinfo_codeset();
00106     iconv_t ic;
00107 
00108     if (strncmp(langinfo_codeset, UTF8, 5) == 0) {
00109         /* Don't do the conversion if it's
00110          * already in UTF-8 encoding
00111          * Copy over the 'from' to 'to'.
00112          */
00113         strncpy(to, from, buflen);
00114         return 0;
00115     }
00116 
00117     ic = open_iconv(get_langinfo_codeset(), UTF8);
00118     memset(to, 0, buflen);
00119     ileft = strlen(from);
00120     oleft = buflen;
00121 
00122     ret = iconv(ic, &from, &ileft, &to, &oleft);
00123     if (ret == (size_t)-1) {
00124         fprintf(stderr, "utf2native:Failed to convert (err=%d)\n", ret);
00125         exit(1);
00126     }
00127     iconv_close(ic);
00128 
00129     return buflen-oleft;
00130 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:27 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
